data.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp Core & Main Expectations Ahead Of Q4 Earnings
data.description: Core & Main, Inc. (NYSE: CNM) is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings before the market opens on Tuesday, March 24th. Analysts predict the Missouri-based company will post earnings of 42 cents per share, an increase from 34 cents per share in the same period last year. The consensus estimate for Core & Main's quarterly revenue stands at $1.6 billion, down from $1.7 billion a year ago. Earlier this year, on January 26th, Core & Main finalized the acquisition of Pioneer Supply. Despite this news, the company's shares experienced a slight decrease of 0.4%, closing at $47.50 on Thursday. For more in-depth analysis and updated ratings, interested parties can refer to the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga's platform.

data.title: These Analysts Increase Their Forecasts On Darden Restaurants Following Upbeat Results
data.description: Darden Restaurants, Inc. reported impressive third-quarter results, surpassing analyst expectations. The company posted adjusted earnings per share of $2.95, beating the estimated $2.94. Quarterly sales stood at $3.345 billion, a 5.9% rise from the previous year, exceeding the expected $3.333 billion. CEO Rick Cardenas noted the high retention rates of team members and managers, leading to consistent performance and customer satisfaction. Darden revised its fiscal 2026 adjusted EPS guidance to a range of $10.57 to $10.67, compared to the previous $10.50 to $10.70, aligning with the Street's forecast of $10.57. The company anticipates fiscal 2026 sales of $13.224 billion.

data.title: Viewbix: Quantum X Labs Files US Patent Application for a Nuclear Magnetic Resonance (NMR) Gyroscope Hardware Technology, to Reduce and Replace GPS dependency
data.description: Tel Aviv, Israel, 20th March 2026 - Technology company, Viewbix Inc. (Nasdaq: VBIX), revealed that its subsidiary, Quantum X Labs Ltd. has submitted a provisional patent application to the U.S. Patent and Trademark Office. This application pertains to a unique hardware structure for a nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) gyroscope that offers highly precise rotational sensing at a reduced expense compared to current options.

data.title: Visit The Rolling Stones Exhibit in Nashville's Big Back Yard
data.description: The travel-rich region of LEIPER'S FORK, Tennessee welcomes visitors to enjoy the spring season starting March 20, 2026. An exhibition titled "CAUTION! Stones Ahead" showcases the world's largest collection of memorabilia dedicated to The Rolling Stones at The Renaissance Shoals Spa and Resort in Florence, Alabama. This exhibit offers a unique experience and is now open for public viewing.

data.title: Unilever Plots Massive Breakup, Eyes Food Spin-Off Deal With McCormick
data.description: Unilever PLC is reportedly considering separating its food business and is in talks with McCormick & Company Incorporated. Unilever has received an offer for its Foods business and discussions are ongoing. The potential deal signifies a shift towards higher-growth beauty and personal care segments. The Wall Street Journal reported that Unilever aims to streamline its portfolio, in line with a trend of splitting large consumer conglomerates. An all-stock transaction might be announced soon, but there is no guarantee of a deal or terms yet. Both companies are cautious about the outcome.

data.title: Just Good Soil Brings Regenerative Agriculture Science to Home Gardeners with AI-Powered Soil Testing
data.description: A recently launched direct-to-consumer brand is offering professional-grade soil testing and regenerative nutrient protocols to assist home gardeners in cultivating healthier, more nutrient-rich produce. Established in Miami Beach, Florida, Just Good Soil aims to revolutionize gardening practices, with a focus on sustainable techniques. Their services, introduced in March 2026, cater to individuals seeking to enhance their gardening skills. The company provides advanced soil testing and personalized nutrient plans tailored to individual needs. By utilizing these innovative techniques, home gardeners can expect to see improved plant growth and higher nutritional yields. Just Good Soil's initiative underscores a commitment to promoting sustainable and healthy food production among gardening enthusiasts.

data.title: CETY holds talks on projects at Bioenergy Association of California Annual Meeting, discussing future strategies.
data.description: The recent data shows that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 4.2%, which is the lowest it has been in the past 18 months. This decline is significant as it indicates an increase in job opportunities and improved economic conditions. Additionally, the number of jobless claims has decreased by 20,000, reaching a total of 240,000, suggesting a positive trend in the labor market. Experts believe that this improvement is a result of various factors, including the reopening of businesses and the overall recovery from the pandemic-induced economic downturn. The latest figures also reveal that the U.S. economy added 570,000 jobs in the past month, surpassing expectations and pointing towards a positive trajectory for the job market. This progress signifies a step towards a more stable and thriving economy, offering hope for sustained growth and prosperity in the near future.

data.title: Ethereum aims for $2,300 recovery by April 2026, trading at $2,137 with $2,215 resistance. Neutral RSI indicates a potential rally.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Ethereum is currently trading at a value of $2,137, showing a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) and encountering significant resistance at the $2,215 mark. Technical analysis hints at a possible surge towards the $2,300 territory if buyers manage to regain control above the present consolidation area.

data.title: New Book Empowers Medical Nonprofit Leaders to Navigate Investment Decisions with Confidence
data.description: On March 20, 2026, the American Association for Physician Leadership (AAPL) revealed the release of a new book titled "When Mission Meets Money: Financial Guidance for Medical Nonprofit Leaders" authored by Matt Paprocki, JD, CFA, CFP®. This book targets medical nonprofit leaders to provide essential financial advice.

data.title: Spear's Landscape Celebrates 25 Years in Business
data.description: In Rogers, Minnesota, on March 20, 2026, Spear's Landscape, a renowned company specializing in upscale landscaping and outdoor living projects, is gearing up to mark its 25th year in business. Founded by Jeff Spear, the company has earned a stellar reputation for its commitment to providing superior customer service and top-notch designs. The milestone anniversary celebration for Spear's Landscape highlights its dedication to excellence in the industry.
